category_sources: source_facts.description says Synergy is a keyboard and mouse sharing tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description and source_facts.homepage use the official Synergy product name; source_facts.repo is symless/synergy.
docs_sources: source_facts.repo is the official source repository; its README is the available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies keyboard and mouse sharing; source_facts.executables lists client and server commands.
